bypass_policy_lockout_safety_check.description: Determines whether the key policy lockout safety check is bypassed, allowing removal of the default policy without restrictions; set to true with caution to avoid losing access to the key.

key_id.description: Identifier for the KMS key to which the policy will be attached; must be a valid KMS key ID or ARN.

policy.description: Defines the JSON policy document that specifies permissions and access controls for the KMS key. Must be a valid IAM policy JSON.
